instruction: Exit the room and turn left, head toward the kitchen and turn right. Go through the kitchen and out the door. Wait right at the bathroom door.

Reconsidering the layout: the corridor itself is likely straight and symmetric left-to-right, which would explain why turning 90° left and 90° right (equivalent to 270° after multiple left turns) show the same mirror view.
